ddls:
CREATE TABLE "charging_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charging session */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being charged */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging station */,
  "port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging port */,
  "charge_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the charging session */,
  "charge_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the charging session */,
  "mileage" REAL /* Mileage of the vehicle at the start of charging */,
  "charge_start_soc" INTEGER /* State of charge (SOC) at the start (in percentage) */,
  "charge_end_soc" INTEGER /* State of charge (SOC) at the end (in percentage) */,
  "charge_start_U" REAL /* Voltage at the start of charging (in Volts) */,
  "charge_end_U" REAL /* Voltage at the end of charging (in Volts) */,
  "charge_start_I" REAL /* Current at the start of charging (in Amperes) */,
  "charge_end_I" REAL /* Current at the end of charging (in Amperes) */,
  "charge_max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature during charging (in Celsius) */,
  "charge_min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature during charging (in Celsius) */,
  "charge_energy" REAL /* Total energy consumed during charging (in kWh) */,
  "energy_price" REAL /* Cost of energy at the time of charging (in currency units) */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., completed, aborted, ongoing) */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charging_sessions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charging_sessions_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES charging_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "battery_capacity" REAL /* Battery capacity of the vehicle (in kWh) */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Last service date of the vehicle */,
  "service_interval" TEXT /* Recommended service interval (in miles or days) */,
  "total_mileage" REAL /* Total mileage of the vehicle */,
  "battery_health" REAL /* Health of the battery (in percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charging_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charging station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the charging station */,
  "total_ports" INTEGER /* Number of charging ports available at the station */,
  "charging_type" TEXT /* Type of charging (e.g., Level 1, Level 2, DC Fast Charge) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of next scheduled maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., operational, under maintenance, offline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fleet manager, technician, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging session related to the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., temperature warning, SOC critical) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message about the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES charging_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging station that received maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine checkup, emergency repair) */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the maintenance */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost of the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES charging_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charging_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistics record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging station this record pertains to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the statistics period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the statistics period */,
  "total_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of charging sessions recorded */,
  "total_energy" REAL /* Total energy consumed across all sessions (in kWh) */,
  "average_energy" REAL /* Average energy consumed per session (in kWh) */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of charging sessions (in minutes) */,
  "peak_usage_time" TEXT /* Time of peak usage during the period */,
  "total_sessions_per_day" REAL /* Average number of sessions per day */,
  "total_energy_per_day" REAL /* Average energy consumed per day (in kWh) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charging_statistics_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES charging_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy usage record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging station */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of energy consumption */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the energy usage period */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the energy usage period */,
  "energy_consumed" REAL /* Total energy consumed on that date (in kWh) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Total cost incurred for energy consumed on that date */,
  "peak_energy" REAL /* Peak energy consumption during the period (in kWh) */,
  "average_energy" REAL /* Average energy consumption during the period (in kWh) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_usage_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES charging_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charging_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date and time of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the role assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the role assignment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the role assignment (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
